SEQUENCE.COMMENT: discernDocumentLoop - loop over the discernment records and return sFound if one is selected, along with sRuleNum and sWorkflowIID

record.value: 0 or the sessionid of the caller

LOOP.COMMENT: loop through each and every discernment record to try and find one and ONLY one that matches

MAP.COMMENT: extract all fields from the current discernment record
peform expression evaluation on the 8 discernment queries producing sDocVal0-7
combine all 8 document values together + all 8 discernment values together into 2 separate concatenated strings

INVOKE.NAME: MIME
INVOKE.COMMENT: sAll8DocValues with XXX based on regex=sAll8DiscernmentValues --> testXXXvalue
Rule %sCurRuleNum% acting on %sCurActingOn% with found=%sFound% and test=%testXXXvalue%: comparing %sAll8DocValues% to %sAll8DiscernmentValues%

Values.value: Rule %sCurRuleNum% acting on %sCurActingOn% with found=%sFound% and test=%testXXXvalue%: comparing %sAll8DocValues% to %sAll8DiscernmentValues%

BRANCH.COMMENT: now try to match all 8 expression results to the discernment values

Values.value: Under %sCurActingOn% rule %sCurRuleNum%: Query0 %sCurDiscernQuery0% = %sDocVal0% matches %sCurDiscernVal0% Query1 %sCurDiscernQuery1% = %sDocVal1% matches %sCurDiscernVal1% Query2 %sCurDiscernQuery2% = %sDocVal2% matches %sCurDiscernVal2% Query3 %sCurDiscernQuery3% = %sDocVal3% matches %sCurDiscernVal3% Query4 %sCurDiscernQuery4% = %sDocVal4% matches %sCurDiscernVal4% Query5 %sCurDiscernQuery5% = %sDocVal5% matches %sCurDiscernVal5% Query6 %sCurDiscernQuery6% = %sDocVal6% matches %sCurDiscernVal6% Query7 %sCurDiscernQuery7% = %sDocVal7% matches %sCurDiscernVal7%

MAP.COMMENT: sFound = true save the sRuleNum, sWorkflowIID and the accessed date

SEQUENCE.NAME: sFound=='true' && sCurActingOn=='MIME' && testXXXvalue=='XXX'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: we found more than one discernment record

Values.value: Under %sCurActingOn% rule %sCurRuleNum%: Query0 %sCurDiscernQuery0% = %sDocVal0% matches %sCurDiscernVal0% Query1 %sCurDiscernQuery1% = %sDocVal1% matches %sCurDiscernVal1% Query2 %sCurDiscernQuery2% = %sDocVal2% matches %sCurDiscernVal2% Query3 %sCurDiscernQuery3% = %sDocVal3% matches %sCurDiscernVal3% Query4 %sCurDiscernQuery4% = %sDocVal4% matches %sCurDiscernVal4% Query5 %sCurDiscernQuery5% = %sDocVal5% matches %sCurDiscernVal5% Query6 %sCurDiscernQuery6% = %sDocVal6% matches %sCurDiscernVal6% Query7 %sCurDiscernQuery7% = %sDocVal7% matches %sCurDiscernVal7%

MAP.COMMENT: sFound = fail sFoundMessage = Discernment rule %sCurRuleNum% is in conflict with rule %sRuleNum%

Values.value: Discernment rule %sCurRuleNum% is in conflict with rule %sRuleNum%

Under %sCurActingOn% rule %sCurRuleNum%: Query0 %sCurDiscernQuery0% = %sDocVal0% matches %sCurDiscernVal0% Query1 %sCurDiscernQuery1% = %sDocVal1% matches %sCurDiscernVal1% Query2 %sCurDiscernQuery2% = %sDocVal2% matches %sCurDiscernVal2% Query3 %sCurDiscernQuery3% = %sDocVal3% matches %sCurDiscernVal3% Query4 %sCurDiscernQuery4% = %sDocVal4% matches %sCurDiscernVal4% Query5 %sCurDiscernQuery5% = %sDocVal5% matches %sCurDiscernVal5% Query6 %sCurDiscernQuery6% = %sDocVal6% matches %sCurDiscernVal6% Query7 %sCurDiscernQuery7% = %sDocVal7% matches %sCurDiscernVal7%

MAP.COMMENT: sFound = true save the sRuleNum, sWorkflowIID and the accessed date

SEQUENCE.NAME: sFound=='true' && sCurActingOn!='MIME' && sAll8DocValues==sAll8DiscernmentValues
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: we found more than one discernment record

Values.value: Under %sCurActingOn% rule %sCurRuleNum%: Query0 %sCurDiscernQuery0% = %sDocVal0% matches %sCurDiscernVal0% Query1 %sCurDiscernQuery1% = %sDocVal1% matches %sCurDiscernVal1% Query2 %sCurDiscernQuery2% = %sDocVal2% matches %sCurDiscernVal2% Query3 %sCurDiscernQuery3% = %sDocVal3% matches %sCurDiscernVal3% Query4 %sCurDiscernQuery4% = %sDocVal4% matches %sCurDiscernVal4% Query5 %sCurDiscernQuery5% = %sDocVal5% matches %sCurDiscernVal5% Query6 %sCurDiscernQuery6% = %sDocVal6% matches %sCurDiscernVal6% Query7 %sCurDiscernQuery7% = %sDocVal7% matches %sCurDiscernVal7%

MAP.COMMENT: sFound = fail sFoundMessage = Discernment rule %sCurRuleNum% is in conflict with rule %sRuleNum%

Values.value: Discernment rule %sCurRuleNum% is in conflict with rule %sRuleNum%
